uploadPrompt: Initialize Sensor Scan — Select Crop Image
emergencyText: Deploy mechanical bracing to critical sectors to prevent total crop collapse.
nutritionText: Suspend nitrogen input; trigger calcium-magnesium infusion for cell wall hardening.
waterText: Active drainage required in Sector B3/C1 to stabilize root-anchoring substrates.
growthText: Balance PGR application to optimize stem-to-foliage weight ratio.
potassiumText: Execute foliar K-spray to enhance osmotic pressure and stem rigidity.
observationText: Continuous drone-loop monitoring active in sector-specific quadrants.
optimalText: The crop matrix shows excellent structural integrity with robust vertical growth patterns.
nutritionContinue: Continue standard NPK fertilization schedule. No defensive alterations required at this stage.
preventiveText: Apply prophylactic silicate treatments bi-weekly; silicon deposits in epidermal cells will safeguard against future stress.
actionMild: Optimal health. Continue standard irrigation schedule.
actionModerate: Yellow Alert: Wind damage detected. Monitor stalk integrity.
actionSevere: Red Alert: Severe inclination. Halt nitrogen application & provide structural support.
